sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: [ARS] F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article announces an ARS SEC filing by F&G Annuities & Life, Inc. (FG) on April 30, 2026. The filing is available as a PDF document on SEC EDGAR and is categorized with a low impact and neutral sentiment. The article also provides recent news and SEC filings for FG, along with key stock data such as market cap and industry.

feed.title: Trustmark (TRMK) director awarded 1,396 shares of common stock
feed.summary: Augustus L. Collins, a director at Trustmark Corp (TRMK), was granted 1,396 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, as a compensation-related award with no cash cost. Following this transaction, Collins directly holds a total of 15,430 shares, which includes shares from an employee stock purchase plan and a dividend reinvestment plan. This Form 4 filing indicates an acquisition of shares rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Citi Maintains Teradata Corp(TDC.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $38
feed.summary: Citi analysts have reiterated a Buy rating on Teradata Corp (TDC.US) but have revised their target price downwards to $38. This adjustment suggests a continued positive outlook on the company despite the reduced price target, indicating potential challenges or updated financial models.

feed.title: Paychex Declares a 10% Increase to Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Paychex Inc. has announced a 10% increase to its quarterly cash dividend. This information was released via a press release and disseminated through Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform for retail investors. The platform provides various financial insights, including analyst ratings, insider trading, and SEC filings.

feed.title: First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund (NASDAQ:TDIV) Reaches New 52-Week High - What's Next?
feed.summary: The First Trust NASDAQ Technology Dividend Index Fund (TDIV) reached a new 52-week high of $108.55 on Friday. The fund has a market cap of $4.13 billion and recently paid a quarterly dividend of $0.3153 per share. Institutional investors have shown interest, with several hedge funds purchasing new positions in the stock.

feed.title: [144] GLOBE LIFE INC. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This SEC filing (Form 144) for Globe Life Inc. (GL) details a proposed sale of 25,000 shares of common stock, acquired through a stock option exercise, with an aggregate market value of $3,813,500. The transaction is dated May 1, 2026, and the securities are to be sold on the NYSE. The filer declares no knowledge of material adverse information concerning Globe Life Inc.

feed.title: Terex reconfirms 2026 EPS of $4.50-$5.00 while targeting $75M REV synergy run rate within 24 months
feed.summary: Terex has reconfirmed its 2026 earnings per share (EPS) target of $4.50 to $5.00. Additionally, the company is aiming to achieve a $75 million synergy run rate within 24 months through revenue optimization initiatives. This indicates a focus on both profitability and strategic revenue growth.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Stock Just Made Goldman’s Top Buys List. Here’s Why.
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) has been added to Goldman Sachs' U.S. Conviction List—Director’s Cut after a recent earnings beat. Goldman Sachs views UnitedHealth's strategy as a "shrink to grow" story. This inclusion signifies a significant boost for the company's turnaround efforts.

feed.title: Telkom Indonesia Delays 2025 Annual Report and Q1 2026 Results Amid Ongoing Audit
feed.summary: Telkom Indonesia announced delays in filing its 2025 annual report and Q1 2026 financial statements due to an ongoing external audit. As a dual-listed company, Telkom will utilize the SEC grace period, aiming to submit its annual report by May 15, 2026, and Q1 results by May 31, 2026, noting that operations remain unaffected. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates TLK as Outperform, citing strong financials and a positive market trend despite concerns about declining revenue growth.

feed.title: Colony Bankcorp Inc Stock (US19623C1099): Q1 2026 Net Income Rises to $8.2M
authors: AD HOC NEWS Editorial Team – Equity Coverage.
feed.summary: Colony Bankcorp Inc reported a net income of $8.2 million for Q1 2026, marking an increase from $7.8 million in Q4 2025, with net interest margin expanding to 3.48%. This positive performance is largely attributed to the successful acquisition of TC Bancshares in Q4 2025, which bolstered assets and the deposit base. The company's core business model relies on net interest income from loans and deposits, with expanded operations across Georgia, Alabama, Florida, and South Carolina.

feed.title: Insider Richard Steele sells Common shares at MCO (NYSE: MCO) — Form 144
feed.summary: Richard Steele, an insider at Moody's Corp (MCO), has filed a Form 144 detailing recent sales and restricted stock vesting. The filing indicates a sale of 375 shares on March 3, 2026, for $171,266.25 and another sale or transfer of 158 shares on April 1, 2026, for $69,167.66. Additionally, 158 shares were tied to restricted stock vesting on March 1, 2026, with Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC listed as the broker.

feed.title: Massachusetts joins challenge to broadcast mega merger
feed.summary: Massachusetts Attorney General Andrea Campbell and her counterparts from over a dozen other states are challenging the proposed $6.2 billion merger between Nexstar and TEGNA. They argue the deal, involving the nation's largest and third-largest television station conglomerates, is unlawful and would lead to higher cable TV bills for consumers already facing rising living costs. The states' lawsuit, which now includes Massachusetts, Indiana, Kansas, Pennsylvania, and Vermont, has been consolidated with a related challenge filed by DIRECTV.

feed.title: Telkom Indonesia Sets Fully Electronic 2025 AGMS for June 8, 2026
feed.summary: PT Telkom Indonesia Tbk (TLK) has announced its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) for the 2025 financial year will be held electronically on June 8, 2026, at 14:00 Western Indonesia Time. The meeting will utilize the KSEI Electronic General Meeting System (eASY.KSEI), allowing eligible shareholders recorded by May 13, 2026, to participate online or via electronic proxies. The company has also outlined procedures for shareholders to propose agenda items by May 9, 2026, ensuring compliance with new Indonesian Financial Services Authority regulations for fully digital shareholder meetings.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on Intercontinental Exchange to $193 From $191
feed.summary: TD Cowen has adjusted its price target for Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) to $193, an increase from its previous target of $191. This update reflects a revised outlook from the financial services firm. The article also notes recent price target adjustments from Raymond James and Goldman Sachs for ICE.

feed.title: Diehl Automotive Group adds Toyota, VW dealerships amid buying spree
feed.summary: The Diehl Automotive Group has expanded its portfolio by acquiring Toyota and Volkswagen dealerships in Wooster, Ohio, and McElwain Motor Car Company in Pennsylvania, bringing their total to 24 rooftops and 33 franchises. CEO Corina Diehl attributes this rapid growth to a refined corporate structure and an emphasis on volume brands. The group also actively seeks to acquire collision centers, viewing them as a profitable and specialized business line.

feed.title: Telkom Indonesia (NYSE: TLK) plans online 2025 AGM for June 8, 2026
feed.summary: Telkom Indonesia (NYSE: TLK) has announced its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders (AGMS) for the financial year 2025 will be held online on Monday, June 8, 2026, at 14:00 Western Indonesia Time. Shareholders listed in the company’s Register of Shareholders by May 13, 2026, are eligible to attend, and proposals for agenda items must be submitted by May 9, 2026. The formal invitation will be announced on May 16, 2026, across various platforms.

feed.title: Yum! Brands Keeps Winning as Pizza Hut Exit Looms
feed.summary: Yum! Brands reported a strong Q1, driven by Taco Bell's consistent growth and KFC's record development, with global system sales up 6% and digital sales at 63%. Pizza Hut, however, remained an outlier with declining U.S. sales and is currently undergoing a strategic review for potential sale, though the company did not provide an update on its progress. The company also highlighted advancements in technology, including AI integration and new beverage platforms across its brands.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Doubles Caterpillar Price Target to $915: Is This the Most Underrated Industrial of 2026?
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has doubled its price target for Caterpillar (CAT) to $915, upgrading the stock to Equal Weight due to a record backlog and strong demand from the data center power generation business. JPMorgan Chase went even further, raising its target to $1,125 and reiterating an Overweight rating, following Caterpillar's Q1 2026 earnings beat. While the stock's 44x P/E ratio and tariff headwinds present some caution, analysts suggest a shift from cyclical recovery to structural growth, driven by AI infrastructure tailwinds and conservative margin guidance.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corp Stock (PH) Moved Down by 3.24% on May 1: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corp (PH) stock declined by 3.24% despite strong Q3 FY26 results and raised guidance, likely due to a "sell-the-news" reaction and rich valuation. The decrease in GAAP net income from a prior one-time tax benefit also contributed to negative sentiment. Technical indicators suggest mixed signals, with low media coverage and generally positive analyst ratings offset by market valuation concerns.

feed.title: First Solar Contends With Manufacturing Footprint Transition
feed.summary: This article discusses First Solar's (FSLR) manufacturing footprint transition, highlighting challenges and opportunities for the thin-film solar panel technology leader. It notes that First Solar is the largest solar module manufacturer in the Western Hemisphere, utilizing cadmium telluride thin-film technology. The piece also briefly touches on their latest earnings, which showed record U.S. volumes partially offset by price headwinds in India.

feed.title: YUM Brands (YUM) KFC division CEO exercises stock rights and sells common shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Scott Mezvinsky, KFC Division CEO at YUM Brands, exercised stock appreciation rights for 483 shares and subsequently sold 277 shares in an open-market sale and disposed of 206 shares to the issuer, all under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. After these transactions, he holds no directly owned common shares but retains 3,859 stock appreciation rights. This activity is considered routine compensation and portfolio management, rather than an opportunistic trade.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Martin Marietta Materials Price Target to $614 From $608
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has adjusted its price target for Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) to $614, an increase from its previous target of $608. The company also recently reported a rise in profit due to strong pricing and infrastructure demand, along with an acquisition and several executive appointments.

feed.title: Director at Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) sells 6,125 shares of stock
feed.summary: Halliburton director Tobi M. Young sold 6,125 shares of common stock on April 30, 2026, in open-market transactions at prices around $41.72 per share, totaling approximately $255,538. Young also holds 7,485 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) that will vest in one year. This information was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, indicating a moderate filing impact and negative sentiment.

feed.title: Stellantis N.V. (STLA) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that investors who lost money in Stellantis N.V. (STLA) have the opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026, Stellantis made misleading statements about its growth potential and ability to capitalize on the electrification market. Shareholders who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm before the lead plaintiff deadline of June 8, 2026.

feed.title: Higher prices help Hershey top first-quarter estimates
feed.summary: Hershey Co. exceeded Wall Street's first-quarter sales and profit expectations, largely due to price increases and strong demand for gum and mints, partly from GLP-1 users. The company also benefited from declining cocoa costs, a reversal from previous quarters. Hershey forecasts net sales growth of 4% to 5% for fiscal 2026, driven by an 10.6% revenue increase to $3.1 billion, despite a 2% decline in sales volumes.

feed.title: Without wildfire reform, California utilities could see credit impacts: Edison International
feed.summary: Edison International CEO Pedro Pizarro warns that California utilities, including Southern California Edison, could face negative credit rating impacts without significant wildfire liability reforms. He advocates for a return to a cost-of-service model for regulated utilities and praises a recent report outlining "pathways to catastrophe resilience." The company is currently managing numerous claims and lawsuits related to the 2025 Eaton Fire while preparing for future growth in electrification.

feed.title: DTE sees up to 8.4 GW data center opportunity
feed.summary: DTE Energy is actively pursuing significant data center opportunities, including a 1.4 GW Oracle facility and a proposed 1 GW Google project. The utility anticipates a total potential load of up to 8.4 GW, requiring substantial investment in generation and storage. These projects are expected to drive growth and contribute to the high end of DTE's operating earnings per share guidance, while prioritizing customer protection and reliability.

feed.title: Williams Companies (WMB) director receives 4,873-share stock award, now holds 75,586 shares
feed.summary: Williams Companies (WMB) director Peter A. Ragauss was granted 4,873 shares of common stock on April 28, 2026, as part of a compensation award, valued at $73.04 per share. Following this transaction, Ragauss now directly holds 75,586 shares of Williams Companies stock. The total includes 2,738 stock units for the 2026 annual grant and 2,135 dividend equivalents, which are exempt from Section 16 reporting.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Beats On Revenue Despite Middle East Turbulence, Profit Slides
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil reported adjusted earnings of $1.16 per share, beating analyst estimates, and revenue of $85.14 billion, exceeding expectations. Despite these revenue gains, the company's profit slid due to Middle East turbulence, supply disruptions, and financial hedge losses. CEO Darren Woods noted that while Middle East production could return relatively quickly, damaged Qatar LNG trains would take longer for normal flows to resume.

feed.title: EDGAR Filing Documents for 0001628280-26-029112
feed.summary: This SEC filing details the Form 10-Q (Quarterly report) for Cboe Global Markets, Inc., submitted on May 1, 2026, for the period ending March 31, 2026. It includes links to various interactive data documents, exhibits, and graphical files related to the report. The filing also provides comprehensive company information such as CIK, EIN, state of incorporation, and SIC code.

feed.title: Insider sales reported at NEM (NYSE: NEM) — 3,000-share notices
feed.summary: Newmont (NEM) has reported insider sale notices via Form 144, including a 3,000-share notice through Fidelity Brokerage Services and two past dispositions by Peter I. Toth for 3,000 shares each in March and April 2026. The filing also detailed prior restricted stock vesting events in 2024 and 2025 related to compensation. The sales are noted to have a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) rose 4.2% after the insurance brokerage firm reported first-quarter 2026 results. The company met revenue expectations and slightly surpassed profit forecasts, driven by a 27.9% year-over-year increase in revenue to $4.76 billion and adjusted EPS of $4.47. Despite a year-to-date decline, the positive reaction was also bolstered by an "Outperform" rating from Mizuho and increased institutional backing.

feed.title: Matador Resources and SM Energy Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Matador Resources (NYSE:MTDR) and SM Energy (NYSE:SM) fell after Iran submitted a new peace proposal, causing a drop in global oil prices. Brent crude decreased by 2%, and West Texas Intermediate (WTI) saw a 3.7% decline, impacting oil and gas companies due to potential lower revenues. SM Energy, despite its current dip, has been highly volatile but is up significant year-to-date and has shown strong returns over five years.

feed.title: TD (TD) prices callable contingent‑interest notes linked to KRE, SMH, XBI
feed.summary: TD has priced callable contingent interest barrier notes linked to the performance of three ETFs: State Street SPDR S&P Regional Banking (KRE), VanEck Semiconductor (SMH), and State Street SPDR S&P Biotech (XBI). These notes offer a contingent interest rate of approximately 20.15% per annum, payable monthly if each ETF's closing value meets a 70% barrier. TD can call the notes monthly starting from the third contingent interest payment date, and investors face principal loss if any underlying ETF falls below a 60% barrier at maturity.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announced that investors who suffered losses of $50,000 or more in Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI) have the opportunity to lead a securities fraud class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that between February 2, 2024, and March 19, 2026, Super Micro failed to disclose that a significant portion of its server sales to companies in China violated U.S. export control laws due to material weaknesses in its compliance controls, leading to misleading positive statements about the company's business. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm before the May 26, 2026 lead plaintiff deadline.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts Price Target on Freeport-McMoRan to $66 From $67
feed.summary: Citigroup has adjusted its price target for Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) to $66, down from the previous $67. This change reflects an updated outlook by the financial institution on the specialty mining and metals company. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for Freeport-McMoRan.

feed.title: NRG Energy (NYSE: NRG) investors back LTIP and new special meeting rights
feed.summary: NRG Energy (NYSE: NRG) stockholders approved all proposals at their annual meeting on April 30, 2026. Key approvals included the election of all ten director nominees, an advisory vote on executive compensation, the ratification of KPMG LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm, and the adoption of the 2026 Long-Term Incentive Plan. Additionally, shareholders passed a proposal granting them the ability to call special shareholder meetings.

feed.title: Deadline Alert: Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders Who Lost
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP is reminding investors who purchased Gartner, Inc. (IT) common stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, of an upcoming May 18, 2026, deadline to file a lead plaintiff motion in a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements regarding its contract value growth rate, which significantly declined, causing substantial stock price drops and investor losses. Investors who suffered losses are urged to contact the firm to inquire about their rights.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC Urges LKQ Corporation Investors to Act: Class Action Filed Alleging Investor Harm
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman LLC has filed a class action lawsuit against LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ: LKQ) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 27, 2023, and July 23, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that LKQ made false and misleading statements regarding its acquisition and integration of FinishMaster, claiming it was not the "minimal integration risk" or "compelling strategic fit" represented. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to join the case, with a lead plaintiff deadline of June 22, 2026.

feed.title: Stellantis N.V. (STLA) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz announce a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Stellantis N.V. (STLA) for investors who suffered losses between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis made misleading statements regarding its growth forecasts and position in the electrification market, leading to considerable charges for the company. Investors have until June 8, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiff in this action.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Hubbell to $560 From $530
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Hubbell (HUBB) shares to $560, up from the previous target of $530. This adjustment comes after Hubbell released its Q1 2026 earnings, reporting increased adjusted earnings and net sales, and lifting its 2026 profit forecast due to strong demand.

feed.title: BofA raises TD Synnex stock price target to $270 on Hyve growth
feed.summary: BofA Securities has raised its price target for TD Synnex (NYSE: SNX) to $270 from $200, maintaining a Buy rating. The increase is driven by the strong growth and higher margins of Hyve, which BofA sees as an underappreciated asset expanding its addressable market by working with the top five U.S. hyperscalers. The firm projects Hyve's revenue to grow at a 20% three-year compound annual growth rate, leading to earnings estimates above consensus and supporting the stock's attractive valuation as an undervalued equity.

feed.title: SMTC (NASDAQ: SMTC) Form 144 shows Hong Hou sold 2,000 shares on 04/10/2026
feed.summary: A recently filed Form 144 for SMTC (NASDAQ: SMTC) indicates that Hong Hou sold 2,000 shares on April 10, 2026, generating proceeds of $180,220. The filing also details restricted stock vesting events, including 1,534 shares vesting on June 9, 2024, and 466 shares vesting on June 11, 2025. Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC is identified as a broker-custodian in connection with these transactions.

feed.title: A Look At Stock Yards Bancorp’s (SYBT) Valuation After Its Strong First Quarter Earnings Report
feed.summary: Stock Yards Bancorp (SYBT) reported strong first-quarter 2026 earnings, showing higher net interest income and net income. While its P/E ratio of 14.9x suggests it's expensive compared to peers and industry averages, a Simply Wall St Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model indicates a significant intrinsic value discount, estimating fair value at $116.56 against a current share price of $72.33. This discrepancy highlights conflicting valuation signals for potential investors, suggesting further examination of the company's fundamentals and growth prospects is warranted.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Pops 14.5% After Q1 Beat: Still a Buy or Too Late Now?
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) saw its shares climb 14.5% after a strong first-quarter 2026 report, surpassing earnings and revenue expectations due to growth in commercial fee-based membership and Optum Rx strength. Despite improved profitability and a raised EPS guidance for 2026, regulatory and legal risks, along with ongoing membership pressures and current valuation levels, present headwinds. The stock, currently carrying a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), prompts investors to seek clearer visibility on membership trends and regulatory outcomes before further investment.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson (NASDAQ: CHRW) posts Q1 2026 profit growth
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) reported steady first-quarter 2026 results, with net income rising 8.8% to $147.2 million despite a 0.8% decrease in total revenues to $4.0 billion, driven by lower volume in global forwarding services. The company's North American Surface Transportation segment saw revenue growth due to higher pricing, while Global Forwarding revenues declined. CHRW also incurred $20.2 million in restructuring charges related to a cost-reduction program involving automation and AI.

feed.title: Should You Add ANET Stock to Your Portfolio Ahead of Q1 Earnings?
feed.summary: Arista Networks (ANET) is scheduled to report first-quarter 2026 earnings, with analysts expecting revenues of $2.62 billion and earnings of 81 cents per share. The company is anticipated to beat earnings estimates, backed by its positive Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank #2. Key growth drivers include the new XPO platform for AI data centers and strategic collaborations, positioning Arista strongly despite competition.

feed.title: United Airlines shares rise as investors refocus on earnings resilience and pricing actions
feed.summary: United Airlines (UAL) shares rose by 4.3% today, driven by investors reviewing the company's recent quarterly results and management commentary on capacity discipline and pricing strategies amid volatile fuel costs. The company's profitable Q1 2026 update highlighted resilience and margin-supporting actions, including capacity adjustments and efforts to align pricing with cost pressures. Insider sales, institutional trading, government contracts, congressional trading, and analyst ratings for UAL were also provided.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) Price Target Raised to $995.00
feed.summary: Guggenheim raised its price target for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) to $995.00 from $975.00, maintaining a "buy" rating with a potential upside of 41.25%. This comes after Regeneron reported stronger-than-expected Q1 earnings and revenue, along with announcing a $3 billion share repurchase program and a quarterly dividend. Despite the positive financial results, the stock experienced a slight dip, attributed to mixed analyst reactions regarding a U.S. Eylea HD shortfall and insider selling, although institutional ownership remains high.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser reported solid Q1 2026 results with GAAP net earnings of $156 million and adjusted EBITDA of $308 million, a 120% sequential increase. The company saw improvements across all business segments, benefiting from higher lumber and OSB pricing, and completed significant portfolio optimization actions. Despite inflationary pressures and housing market choppiness, Weyerhaeuser remains focused on strategic growth initiatives, including new product development and distribution network expansion, while reiterating full-year guidance for Strategic Land Solutions and maintaining a disciplined approach to capital allocation.
